editable_efficiency.condition: C_op(P) decreases but alternatives remain exercised and C_rest(P) remains manageable

low_cost_convergence.condition: E(P) decreases, C_op(P) decreases, repeated selection increases

silent_fixation.condition: routine succeeds, exceptions compressed, alternatives neglected, F(P) rises

restoration_cost_explosion.condition: F(P) rises and C_rest(P) crosses practical return threshold

authority_hardening.condition: low friction mistaken for truth or universal adequacy

editability_collapse.condition: alternatives formally describable but practically unaffordable
